provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male spacer in his early 20s with a shaved head and a nervous look, wearing a faded charcoal shipboard thermal undersuit with pressure seals at the wrists, a basic cargo harness with a single magnetic tool clip, scuffed mag-lock work boots, a laminated ship ID tag on a cord around his neck, the undersuit is standard issue and too big for him slightly bunching at the waist, a radiation dosimeter badge clipped to the chest, this is someone on his first tour

judgment.explanation: Same role, different seed. Charcoal suit with harness in ship corridor. Consistent.
